rateBasis.tariffNotes:
Rate Notes:
Hotel Tariff Notes: No show & early departure will have extra charges. No date, name & room change allowed. Bookings including children will be based on sharing parents bedding, but no separate bed provided unless otherwise stated. Existing reservation cannot be cancelled & rebooked under lower promotion. Compulsory Tourism Dirham Fee to be paid directly to the hotel per room/night. During Ramadan, restrictions may apply for the operations of the restaurants & bars of the hotel as per the UAE Law. Half Board Package includes Breakfast & 3course set menu for Dinner or Lunch Iftar Buffet is not including in Half Board packages and is available at add. cost per person per meal. Double, Twin, & Triple bed will remain subject to availability upon booking confirmation. Reservation Dept. is open as follows: Sun to Thu: 8am-8pm & Fri to Sat: 9am-8pm
Please note guests are not allowed to cancel existing bookings and rebook. The hotel has the right to reject the booking.
Please note that Half Board (Dinner) and Full Board are NOT available during New Year’s Eve on 31st December. However, Half Board Lunch is available on 31st December.
The Tourism Dirham Fee charged per room per night is applicable when booking guest rooms & suites and it will be collected directly at the property and is not reflected in the room rate.
Please note that the breakfast venue has been moved to a new location.

Rate Notes:
Hotel Tariff Notes: No show & early departure will have extra charges. No date, name & room change allowed. Bookings including children will be based on sharing parents bedding, but no separate bed provided unless otherwise stated. Existing reservation cannot be cancelled & rebooked under lower promotion. Compulsory Tourism Dirham Fee to be paid directly to the hotel per room/night. During Ramadan, restrictions may apply for the operations of the restaurants & bars of the hotel as per the UAE Law. Half Board Package includes Breakfast & 3course set menu for Dinner or Lunch Iftar Buffet is not including in Half Board packages and is available at add. cost per person per meal. Double, Twin, & Triple bed will remain subject to availability upon booking confirmation. Reservation Dept. is open as follows: Sun to Thu: 8am-8pm & Fri to Sat: 9am-8pm
Please note guests are not allowed to cancel existing bookings and rebook. The hotel has the right to reject the booking.
Please note that Half Board (Dinner) and Full Board are NOT available during New Year’s Eve on 31st December. However, Half Board Lunch is available on 31st December.
The Tourism Dirham Fee charged per room per night is applicable when booking guest rooms & suites and it will be collected directly at the property and is not reflected in the room rate.
Please note that the breakfast venue has been moved to a new location.

Half Board Package includes Breakfast & 3course set menu for Dinner or Lunch Iftar Buffet is not including in Half Board packages and is available at add. cost per person per meal. Double, Twin, & Triple bed will remain subject to availability upon booking confirmation. Reservation Dept. is open as follows: Sun to Thu: 8am-8pm & Fri to Sat: 9am-8pm
Please note guests are not allowed to cancel existing bookings and rebook. The hotel has the right to reject the booking.
Please note that Half Board (Dinner) and Full Board are NOT available during New Year’s Eve on 31st December. However, Half Board Lunch is available on 31st December.
The Tourism Dirham Fee charged per room per night is applicable when booking guest rooms & suites and it will be collected directly at the property and is not reflected in the room rate.
Please note that the breakfast venue has been moved to a new location.
